name: Dandicus Dandifer (ANYPOV)
description: This is my AU version of Dandy, he is less greedy and more sweet, he is very silly and very kindhearted. (This is not the main Dandy’s World continuity though twisted’s can be involved, This character was also made for comfort hence the Fluff tag but can be used for sexual content as well)
